creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Whilst (WWW) <http://mlmmj.org/> is alive, I can't easily find evidence of anything significant since 2017. 

<http://mlmmj.org/downloads/> the most recent release was more than five years ago. 

<http://mlmmj.org/archive/mlmmj/2017-11/0000001.html> was significant, then <http://mlmmj.org/archive/mlmmj/> in December 2017 it seemed that hope was abandoned. 

From spam in the bug tracker, I assume that the tracker is alive, but no longer managed: 

* <http://mlmmj.org/bugs/bug.php?id=71>
* <http://mlmmj.org/bugs/bug.php?id=73> 

I see <https://www.freshports.org/mail/mlmmj/#history>, so I do not doubt that development occurs. However: 

* if true development for this port will never be in the mlmmj.org domain, 
  then can we be more realistic about the WWW?

Thanks
